start.description:
This tool helps you determine if you are up-to-date with your routine vaccinations in the UK.

*Please note: This is a demo tool and not an official NHS service.*

age_check.description: Vaccination eligibility in the UK often depends on your age group.

under_18_path.text: Have you completed your school-age vaccinations?
under_18_path.description:
This includes the 3-in-1 teenage booster (polio, diphtheria, and tetanus) and the MenACWY vaccine.

[View the NHS vaccination schedule](https://www.nhs.uk/conditions/vaccinations/nhs-vaccination-schedule/)

adult_path.text: Do you have any underlying health conditions?
adult_path.description: Conditions include asthma, diabetes, or being immunosuppressed. This affects your eligibility for seasonal boosters.

senior_path.text: Have you had your seasonal Flu and COVID-19 boosters?
senior_path.description: Adults over 65 are eligible for free seasonal vaccinations every autumn/winter in the UK.

seasonal_check.text: When was your last COVID-19 booster?
seasonal_check.description: Boosters are typically offered seasonally to those at higher risk.

routine_check.text: Are you up to date with MMR?
routine_check.description: The MMR (Measles, Mumps, and Rubella) vaccine is usually given in two doses during childhood.

pneumococcal_check.description: People aged 65 and over are eligible for a one-off pneumococcal polysaccharide vaccine (PPV).

result_young_up_to_date.text: You appear to be up to date!
result_young_up_to_date.description: Based on your age, you have completed the standard UK childhood schedule. Keep an eye out for any future school-based invitations.

result_check_red_book.description: Ask your parents for your **Personal Child Health Record** (the 'Red Book') or contact your GP surgery to confirm your status.

result_book_nhs.text: You may be eligible for a vaccination
result_book_nhs.description:
It looks like you might be missing a seasonal or age-related vaccine.

[Book via the NHS App](https://www.nhs.uk/nhs-app/) or contact your local pharmacy.

result_adult_protected.description: You have received your routine adult vaccinations. If you are planning to travel abroad, you may need additional travel-specific vaccines.

result_senior_fully_protected.description: You have completed your routine, seasonal, and one-off (PPV) vaccinations. Continue to attend your annual flu jab appointments.

result_check_gp.description: If you missed vaccines as a child, you can catch up at any age on the NHS. Contact your GP surgery to arrange an appointment.
